title: rosa canina f. ramosissima
intro: Rosa canina f. ramosissima, also known as the upright or branched dog rose, is a shrub-like variant of the dog rose plant (Rosa canina), characterized by its robust and branched stem. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing flavonoids, phenolic acids, and ascorbic acid, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. ramosissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and herbalism.
